techStack:
Swift 5 / SwiftUI / AppKit / IOKit / Combine / AuthorizationServices
Target: macOS 14.0+ (arm64 + x86_64)
Bundle ID: com.batkill.app
Zero external dependencies, pure swiftc compilation
build:
bash build.sh (arm64) or manual swiftc -target x86_64-apple-macosx14.0 (x86_64)
swiftc flags: -parse-as-library -O -whole-module-optimization
Frameworks: SwiftUI, AppKit, IOKit, UserNotifications, ServiceManagement, Combine
Output: .build/BatKill.app (arm64) → Releases/arm64/BatKill-arm.app
x86_64 binary → Releases/x86_64/BatKill-x86.app with manual .app bundling
conventions:
No Xcode project (swiftc only)
@main struct BatKillApp (SwiftUI App, Parse-as-library)
LSUIElement = true (menu bar only, no Dock icon)
All user-facing text uses LocalizationManager.translate(en, zh)
File log at /tmp/batkill.log
Power action queue with debounce (pendingPowerAction merging) + cooldown (30s)
Admin auth via AuthorizationServices (dlsym dynamic load for deprecated API)
batteryOptimization:
BatteryMonitor: adaptive poll interval (5s AC / 15s battery), adjustPollInterval() called on state change
HardwareMonitor: @Published var isRunningOnBattery flag, synced from AppDelegate
TemperatureView: battery-aware SMC refresh timer via makeRefreshTimer(onBattery:), dynamically reacts via .onReceive
Refresh intervals: arm64 2s AC / 3s battery, x86_64 4s AC / 6s battery
Extracted into file-level functions: hardwareRefreshInterval(onBattery:), batteryPollInterval(onBattery:)
authDialogFix:
HardwareMonitor: authDenied + authInProgress static flags, resetAuthDenied()
FanController.requestAdminAuth(): three-state gate — single instance, denial tracking, never auto-retrigger
TemperatureView.onAppear: no auto-preset-apply when preset requires auth
Denial resets triggered by explicit user actions only (Authorize Admin button tap, preset tap)
testing:
Lightweight custom test framework (Tests/Sources/Core/TestFramework.swift)
Run via: bash Tests/run_tests.sh
Test count: 164/166 passed (2 pre-existing FanPresetStore failures)
New tests: BatteryOptimizationTests (6 cases) — hardwareRefreshInterval AC/battery, batteryPollInterval AC/battery, battery-greater-than-AC invariant
